# Evolution Journal

Append-only log of agent decisions and outcomes. Each agent appends an entry after every run.

## Entry Format

```
## YYYY-MM-DD — <agent-name>
**Action**: <what was done or noop>
**Outcome**: <PR merged / PR rejected / noop / pending>
**Lesson**: <what to remember for next time>
```
